blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt stand 90 minutes from Champions League immortality
3-1 from the first leg and heading to San Siro. Even Klopp is asking what they're doing. Norwegian football has never been closer to a Champions League quarter-final.

blocks.label: ⚽ More CL second legs — Tue & Wed
items: Tue 18:45 — Atlético Madrid vs Club Brugge (all square, wide open)
Wed 21:00 — PSG vs Monaco (3-2 PSG, French derby decider)
Wed 21:00 — Real Madrid vs Benfica (narrow lead, tense at the Bernabéu)
